name: Barbell
description: A long steel rod used with weight plates for compound exercises like squats, deadlifts, and bench press.

name: Olympic Barbell
description: A standardized 20kg barbell used in Olympic weightlifting and powerlifting for heavy compound lifts.

name: EZ Curl Bar
description: A curved bar designed to reduce wrist strain during bicep curls and tricep extensions.

name: Trap Bar
description: A hexagonal bar used mainly for deadlifts where the lifter stands inside the frame for safer lifting.

name: Safety Squat Bar
description: A padded barbell designed to reduce shoulder stress while performing squats.

name: Dumbbells
description: Handheld weights used for exercises such as curls, presses, lunges, and rows.

name: Adjustable Dumbbells
description: Dumbbells with adjustable plates allowing users to change resistance easily.

name: Kettlebells
description: Cast iron weights with handles used for swings, goblet squats, and functional training.

name: Weight Plates
description: Circular metal or rubber plates used to add resistance to barbells and machines.

name: Bumper Plates
description: Rubber-coated plates designed for Olympic lifts where the bar may be dropped.

name: Fractional Plates
description: Small plates used for gradual weight progression in strength training.

name: Medicine Ball
description: A weighted ball used for core exercises, throws, and explosive training.

name: Slam Ball
description: A heavy ball designed to be slammed on the floor during high-intensity workouts.

name: Sandbag
description: A bag filled with sand used for functional strength and conditioning exercises.

name: Bulgarian Bag
description: A crescent-shaped weighted bag used for rotational strength and endurance training.

name: Steel Mace
description: A long lever weight used to train shoulder mobility, grip, and rotational strength.

name: Indian Clubs
description: Traditional club-shaped weights used for shoulder mobility and endurance training.

name: Flat Bench
description: A flat padded bench used for exercises like bench press, dumbbell press, and step-ups.

name: Adjustable Bench
description: A bench adjustable to incline, flat, or decline positions for various strength exercises.

name: Incline Bench
description: A bench angled upward mainly used for upper chest and shoulder exercises.

name: Decline Bench
description: A downward angled bench used for lower chest workouts and decline sit-ups.

name: Utility Bench
description: A versatile bench used for many dumbbell and bodyweight exercises.

name: Olympic Bench
description: A heavy-duty bench designed specifically for Olympic barbell bench press.

name: Preacher Curl Bench
description: A bench with an angled pad used to isolate the biceps during curls.

name: Sit-up Bench
description: A bench designed for abdominal exercises such as sit-ups and crunches.

name: Power Rack
description: A strong frame used for barbell squats, bench press, and other heavy compound lifts.

name: Half Rack
description: A compact version of a power rack that supports major barbell lifts while saving space.

name: Squat Rack
description: A rack used to hold barbells at shoulder height for squats and similar exercises.

name: Deadlift Platform
description: A reinforced platform designed for safe deadlifting and Olympic lifting.

name: Smith Machine
description: A barbell fixed on vertical rails allowing controlled lifting movements.

name: Functional Trainer
description: A cable-based machine with adjustable pulleys for full-body functional workouts.

name: Cable Crossover Machine
description: A dual cable machine mainly used for chest fly and upper body exercises.

name: Chest Press Machine
description: A machine that simulates the bench press to strengthen chest muscles.

name: Incline Chest Press Machine
description: A pressing machine angled to target the upper chest.

name: Decline Chest Press Machine
description: A machine designed to train the lower portion of the chest.

name: Pec Deck Machine
description: A machine used for chest fly exercises that isolate the chest muscles.

name: Rear Delt Machine
description: A machine used to train the rear shoulder and upper back muscles.

name: Shoulder Press Machine
description: A seated machine used for overhead pressing to strengthen shoulders.

name: Lateral Raise Machine
description: A machine designed to isolate and strengthen the side deltoid muscles.

name: Lat Pulldown Machine
description: A machine where a bar is pulled downward to strengthen the back and lat muscles.

name: Seated Row Machine
description: A machine used for rowing movements that target the middle back.

name: Assisted Pull-up Machine
description: A machine that provides assistance for performing pull-ups.

name: Assisted Dip Machine
description: A machine that helps users perform dips with adjustable assistance.

name: Triceps Pushdown Machine
description: A cable-based machine used to isolate and strengthen the triceps.

name: Biceps Curl Machine
description: A machine designed to isolate the biceps during curling movements.

name: Leg Press Machine
description: A machine where users push a weighted platform using their legs to train quads and glutes.

name: Hack Squat Machine
description: A machine that simulates squats while supporting the back.

name: Leg Extension Machine
description: A machine used to isolate and strengthen the quadriceps.

name: Seated Leg Curl Machine
description: A machine used to strengthen hamstrings by curling the legs while seated.

name: Standing Leg Curl Machine
description: A machine used to train hamstrings by bending the leg while standing.

name: Glute Kickback Machine
description: A machine used to strengthen glutes by extending the leg backward.

name: Hip Abduction Machine
description: A machine that strengthens outer hip and glute muscles.

name: Hip Adduction Machine
description: A machine used to train inner thigh muscles.

name: Hip Thrust Machine
description: A machine designed for hip thrusts to develop glute strength.

name: Glute Bridge Machine
description: A machine used to perform glute bridges with resistance.

name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
description: A machine used to strengthen calf muscles by raising the heels.

name: Seated Calf Raise Machine
description: A seated machine designed to isolate calf muscles.

name: Donkey Calf Raise Machine
description: A machine used for heavy calf raises where the user bends forward.

name: Belt Squat Machine
description: A squat machine that loads weight through a belt to reduce spinal pressure.

name: T-Bar Row Machine
description: A plate-loaded machine used for rowing movements to strengthen the back.

name: Plate Loaded Chest Press
description: A chest press machine that uses weight plates instead of a weight stack.

name: Plate Loaded Shoulder Press
description: A plate-loaded machine used for overhead shoulder pressing.

name: Plate Loaded Leg Press
description: A leg press machine that uses weight plates for adjustable resistance.

name: Plate Loaded Row Machine
description: A plate-loaded rowing machine used to strengthen the back muscles.

name: Plate Loaded Hack Squat
description: A hack squat machine that uses plates instead of a fixed weight stack.

name: Cable Tower
description: A tall cable system used for various strength and functional exercises.

name: Dual Adjustable Pulley
description: A cable machine with two adjustable pulleys for versatile exercises.

name: Lat Pulldown Cable
description: A cable setup used for performing lat pulldown exercises.

name: Low Row Cable
description: A cable station used for seated row movements.

name: Cable Squat Machine
description: A cable-based machine used to perform squats with adjustable resistance.

name: Rope Attachment
description: A rope handle attachment used for triceps pushdowns and other cable exercises.

name: Straight Bar Attachment
description: A straight bar used with cable machines for curls and pushdowns.

name: V-Bar Attachment
description: A V-shaped bar used for close-grip cable exercises.

name: Ankle Strap
description: A strap attached to the ankle for cable leg exercises like kickbacks.

name: Treadmill
description: A machine used for walking, jogging, and running indoors.

name: Incline Treadmill
description: A treadmill with adjustable incline to simulate uphill walking or running.

name: Air Runner
description: A curved manual treadmill powered by the user's running movement.

name: Elliptical Trainer
description: A low-impact cardio machine that simulates walking or running.

name: Cross Trainer
description: A cardio machine similar to an elliptical that trains both arms and legs.

name: Stationary Bike
description: A stationary cycling machine used for cardiovascular workouts.

name: Spin Bike
description: A heavy-duty bike designed for high-intensity indoor cycling.

name: Air Bike
description: A fan-based resistance bike that increases difficulty with speed.

name: Recumbent Bike
description: A seated bike with back support used for low-impact cardio.

name: Rowing Machine
description: A machine that simulates rowing and provides a full-body workout.

name: Ski Erg
description: A machine that simulates cross-country skiing movements.

name: Stair Climber
description: A machine that simulates climbing stairs.

name: StairMaster
description: A branded stair climbing machine used for intense lower-body cardio.

name: StepMill
description: A rotating staircase machine for cardio and leg strength.

name: Jacob's Ladder
description: A self-powered ladder climbing machine used for high-intensity cardio.

name: VersaClimber
description: A vertical climbing machine that simulates climbing movements.

name: Arm Ergometer
description: A cardio machine that allows cycling with the arms instead of legs.

name: Pull-up Bar
description: A horizontal bar used for pull-ups and chin-ups.

name: Dip Bars
description: Parallel bars used for performing dips.

name: Parallel Bars
description: Bars used for gymnastics-style bodyweight exercises.

name: Push-up Bars
description: Handles used to perform push-ups with improved wrist alignment.

name: Gym Rings
description: Suspended rings used for advanced bodyweight and gymnastics exercises.

name: Climbing Rope
description: A thick rope used for climbing exercises to build grip and upper body strength.

name: Wall Bars
description: A wall-mounted ladder used for stretching and bodyweight training.

name: Battle Ropes
description: Heavy ropes used for high-intensity conditioning workouts.

name: Resistance Bands
description: Elastic bands used for strength training and mobility work.

name: Loop Bands
description: Circular resistance bands used for lower-body exercises.

name: Power Bands
description: Heavy resistance bands used for strength training and assisted pull-ups.

name: TRX Suspension Trainer
description: Suspension straps used for bodyweight exercises.

name: Agility Ladder
description: A ladder placed on the floor for speed and agility drills.

name: Plyometric Box
description: A sturdy box used for explosive jump training.

name: Jump Box
description: A platform used for plyometric jump exercises.

name: Parallettes
description: Small parallel bars used for calisthenics exercises.

name: Landmine Attachment
description: A barbell attachment that allows rotational exercises.

name: Sled Push
description: A sled used for pushing exercises to build strength and conditioning.

name: Weighted Sled
description: A sled loaded with weights used for pushing or pulling workouts.

name: Farmer Carry Handles
description: Handles used to perform farmer walks for grip and full-body strength.

name: Tire Flip
description: A large tire used in strongman-style flipping exercises.

name: Roman Chair
description: A bench used for back extensions and core strengthening exercises.

name: Hyperextension Bench
description: A bench designed for lower back and glute strengthening exercises.

name: Decline Ab Bench
description: A decline bench used for advanced abdominal exercises.

name: Ab Crunch Machine
description: A machine designed to isolate abdominal muscles during crunches.

name: Captain's Chair
description: A station used for leg raises and core exercises.

name: Ab Roller
description: A wheel device used for intense abdominal rollout exercises.

name: Core Sliders
description: Sliding discs used for core and stability exercises.

name: Stability Ball
description: A large inflatable ball used for balance and core training.

name: BOSU Ball

name: Reverse Hyper Machine
description: A machine used to strengthen lower back and glutes.

name: Glute Ham Developer
description: A machine used for hamstring and glute strengthening exercises.

name: Nordic Hamstring Bench

name: Pendulum Squat Machine
description: A squat machine that follows a pendulum-style movement path.

name: Sissy Squat Machine
description: A machine designed to isolate quadriceps during squats.

name: Iso-Lateral Machine

name: Leverage Machine

name: Foam Roller

name: Massage Gun
description: A handheld device that provides deep muscle massage for recovery.

name: Stretching Machine
description: A machine designed to help users perform guided stretching exercises.

name: Infrared Sauna
